message:
feat(a11y): implement Accessible trait for Block, Paragraph, Scrollbar, and Spinner widgets

Continues the accessibility work from #44 by adding `ftui_a11y::Accessible`
implementations for four more widget types:

- **Block**: Emits a `Group` role node, using the block title as the accessible
  name when present
- **Paragraph**: Emits a `Label` role node, extracting plain text from all spans
  as the name (or description if a block title exists), with truncation at 200
  chars to keep a11y nodes manageable
- **Scrollbar**: Emits a `ScrollBar` role node with orientation-aware naming
  (e.g. "vertical scrollbar"), using default A11yState since the viewport—not
  the scrollbar—is the focusable element
- **Spinner**: Emits a `ProgressBar` role node with `busy: true` state, using
  the label (prefixed with "Loading: ") or a default "Loading..." as the name

All implementations follow the pattern established in the prior commit (756d42b)
for Table, List, Gauge, BarChart, and Tabs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
